headline: Fortinet to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: SUNNYVALE, Calif., April 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Fortinet® (NASDAQ: FTNT), the global cybersecurity leader driving the convergence of networking and security, announced that it will hold a conference call to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time). Fortinet's financial results conference call will be broadcast live in listen-only mode on the company’s investor relations website at http://investor.fortinet.com.
